creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
> I have `Internet' charts set up to show ssh connections to my boxes.
> While local gkrellm shows number of connections to port 22 correctly,
> gkrellms working with gkrellmd's on other hosts always show zeroes.
This was fixed by itself after some world and port rebuilds and reboots
on both client and server, please close the PR.

--
